verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Lord, You've touched my heart today That is why I've come to pray You see all I have inside All the things I try to hide

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Jesus, I believe that You are there And You're listening to this sinner's prayer Touch this broken heart and make it new I believe in You

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Please forgive me for my sin All I've done and all I've been Serving You forevermore Everyday You'll be my Lord

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Jesus, I believe that You are there And You're listening to this sinner's prayer Touch this broken heart and make it new I believe in You

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Jesus, I believe that You are there And You're listening to this sinner's prayer Knowing You'll remember what You've heard I believe Your word
